title: Birds fail to close gap
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - Oriented Birds Football Club missed the perfect chance to close the gap in their bid for a Provincial League playoff spot.","html":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - Oriented Birds Football Club missed the perfect chance to close the gap in their bid for a Provincial League playoff spot."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The high-flying Birds, in a Western Cape ABC Motsepe League game, played to a goalless draw against Ammar Soccer Academy from Cape Winelands at Kwanokuthula Stadium on Saturday 8 March."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Birds are presently in second position in the log in the semi-professional league, behind Hanover Park FC (Cape Town Region), who are currently dominating stream B and are sitting comfortably at the top of the log with 33 points.","html":"The Birds are presently in second position in the log in the semi-professional league, behind Hanover Park FC (Cape Town Region), who are currently dominating stream B and are sitting comfortably at the top of the log with 33 points."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Birds have played 14 games, winning eight, drawing four and losing two, and have 28 points.","html":"The Birds have played 14 games, winning eight, drawing four and losing two, and have 28 points."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
